channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics

item.title: Talking Sense: Coming together to solve tough problems
item.description: Mariah Levison and Rob Fersh help people find consensus on how to solve divisive issues, ranging from prison reform to what art should hang in the Minnesota Capitol. Learn how they do it in this MPR News Talking Sense conversation hosted by MPR News correspondent Catharine Richert.
item.dc:creator: Angela Davis, Catharine Richert, Maja Beckstrom, and Annie Baxter, MPR News

item.title: Texas Senate to pursue ban on THC products next year, Lt. Gov. Dan Patrick says
item.description: Patrick contends retailers have exploited a law passed in 2019 to sell unregulated and potentially harmful consumable tetrahydrocannabinol products.
item.dc:creator: Texas Tribune, By Jasper Scherer, Alejandra Martinez, Karen Brooks Harper And Stephen Simpson, KPRC 2

item.title: Bitcoin tops $100,000 on optimism over Trump crypto plans
item.description: It last traded at $100,027 as of 0240 GMT, up 2.2% on the previous session, after earlier rising as high as $100,277.
item.dc:creator: Reuters, NewsNation

item.title: California lawmakers kick off special session to 'Trump-proof' the Golden State
item.description: California lawmakers on Monday are kicking off a special legislative session in what Gov. Gavin Newsom (D) has deemed efforts to "Trump-proof" the Golden State from potential federal interference.
item.dc:creator: Sharon Udasin, NewsNation

item.title: GOP rebels go to war over Biden’s mammoth $98B disaster aid request
item.description: The House Freedom Caucus is warning its members will not accept a $100 billion disaster aid package just as Congressional negotiators work on a relief bill.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Hegseth nomination sinking fast in the Senate
item.description: Senate Republicans say Pete Hegseth, President-elect Trump’s choice to head the Defense Department, faces a very tough path to confirmation in the Senate and his bleak prospects have been communicated directly to the Trump transition team, which is now mulling other options.
item.dc:creator: Brett Samuels, NewsNation

item.title: Trump moves to toss Georgia criminal case as president-elect
item.description: President-elect Trump on Wednesday asked to throw out his criminal election interference charges in Georgia following his election victory. Trump’s two federal indictments have already been tossed, and the former president is attempting to do the same in his New York hush money case.
item.dc:creator: Zach Schonfeld, NewsNation

item.title: Minneapolis City Council member Emily Koski joins mayor’s race
item.description: She joins Minnesota DFL Sen. Omar Fateh and the Rev. DeWayne Davis of Plymouth Congregational Church in challenging Mayor Jacob Frey, who’s running for reelection.
item.dc:creator: Megan Burks, MPR News

item.title: Oklahoma measure seeks to make school district superintendents an elected position
item.description: Legislators in Oklahoma are primed to consider forthcoming legislation making the position of local school superintendent an elected one, just as the statewide superintendent is so.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Biden appears to rest his eyes at African summit in Angola
item.description: President Biden appeared to rest his eyes during a summit with African leaders in Lobito, Angola, during his travel overseas to visit African nations.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Some migrants anticipating Trump's policies are already turning back home: report
item.description: Some migrants are planning to return home if they can't get into the U.S. before President-elect Trump takes office.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Trump taps ex-aide Peter Navarro for senior counselor on trade and manufacturing
item.description: President-elect Trump on Wednesday named his once-jailed former aide Peter Navarro as senior counselor for trade and manufacturing to the incoming White House, picking a loyal ally to help implement broad plan for tariffs. Navarro served as White House trade adviser in Trump’s first term.
item.dc:creator: Alex Gangitano, NewsNation

item.title: Hegseth faces growing GOP scrutiny as allegations mount
item.description: Correction: President-elect Trump announced his nomination of Pete Hegseth for Defense Secretary on Nov. 12. A previous version of this article contained incorrect information.
item.dc:creator: Ellen Mitchell, NewsNation

item.title: Hegseth fights to save Pentagon nomination as sources say Trump considers DeSantis
item.description: Pete Hegseth, Donald Trump’s Pentagon pick, is fighting to hold on to his Cabinet nomination amid growing questions about his personal conduct as the president-elect’s team considers alternatives, including Florida Gov. Ron DeSantis.
item.dc:creator: Thomas Beaumont, Adriana Gomez Licon, Zeke Miller And Tara Copp, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Trump's defense pick Pete Hegseth faces deepening scrutiny in Senate
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Pete Hegseth, President-elect Donald Trump's pick for Defense Secretary, spent a second day on Capitol Hill, meeting privately with Republican senators amid rising questions about his ability to effectively lead the Pentagon.
item.dc:creator: LISA MASCARO, MARY CLARE JALONICK and TARA COPP, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Minnesota budget update shows $1.1B less than prior forecast
item.description: The economic report released Wednesday morning by state budget officials projects a downturn, with only a $616 million cushion expected by the end of the next budget period. The new data will guide lawmakers when budget deliberations begin in January.
item.dc:creator: Clay Masters and Brian Bakst, MPR News

item.title: Garland, DOJ leads ask staffers to stay through Trump term: Report
item.description: Attorney General Merrick Garland is one of the top Justice Department officials asking staffers to stay with the agency, reports say.
item.dc:creator: Anna Kutz, NewsNation

item.title: Trump ‘border czar’ offers NYC mayor a call to expedite deportations
item.description: Homan joins NewsNation's "CUOMO" to discuss what the consequences could be for lawmakers opposing mass deportations.
item.dc:creator: Damita Menezes, NewsNation

item.title: Judge in Hunter Biden tax case rebukes president’s claims of unfair treatment
item.description: The federal judge overseeing Hunter Biden’s tax case issued a sharp rebuke of President Biden’s claims his son was unfairly prosecuted in new court filings Tuesday night. U.S.
item.dc:creator: Ella Lee, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Senate Democrats stick with Schumer as leader
item.description: Chuck Schumer faced no opposition in the party leadership elections, in which Illinois Sen. Dick Durbin was also re-elected to the No. 2 spot and Minnesota Sen. Amy Klobuchar became the new No. 3.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, MPR News
